creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253941
Add xfishtank configuration

Add configuration to be able to use x11/xfishtank as a xscreensaver module.

xfishtank has one default, I didn't find a way to properly display the window preview,
but it works in both full screen preview and screensaver.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Q8ZTxsopYA&t=3s
